idea-plugin.name: Alfred
idea-plugin.description:
Alfred is a CLion dev environment butler for multi-chip and embedded workflows.

It snapshots project CLion configuration and IDE settings into named profiles, so teams can set up Arm, RISC-V, or other embedded environments once and ask Alfred to bring the right environment back later.

  • Save current CLion settings as a named profile.
  • Update the active profile without retyping its name.
  • Stage profile switching safely for the next CLion startup.
  • Store profiles in the CLion config directory, not inside the project.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Initial Marketplace-ready release.
  • Renamed the plugin to Alfred.
  • Added named CLion dev environment snapshots.
  • Added active profile updates and safe staged switching.
  • Added Alfred plugin icons and Apache-2.0 licensing.

action.description: Save current CLion project and IDE settings as a named profile
Save current CLion settings into the active profile
Apply a saved profile from clion-dev-envs
